"'''Yeoman Scrapheap'''" was the name the crew of the ''[[Mandian]]'' gave their [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]. It got the name due to the fact that a crewman had stenciled [[Yeoman/Legends|yeoman's]] stripes onto its forehead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
